name: Master Trading Rule Engine - 4 Traders Consensus
description: Battle-tested rules synthesized from 4 expert memecoin traders
consensus_sources: Video 1: Position sizing + market cap analysis
Video 2: Token filtering + scam detection + psychology
Video 4: Execution + fee optimization + account scaling

market_cap_rules.description: Position size multiplier based on market cap risk tier

holder_rules.description: Holder distribution must be clean; detect concentration risk

community_rules.description: Community must exist AND be actively engaged

narrative_rules.description: Boost confidence if token has strong meme/narrative appeal

scam_detection_rules.description: Low fees paid relative to market cap = likely scam (bundlers/bots)

entry_rules.description: Don't FOMO - wait for confirmation signals before entering

exit_rules.description: Take profits flexibly (50-100%); cut losses fast (-20% max)

risk_management.description: Conservative risk limits; position sizing by account balance

fee_optimization.description: Fees matter hugely for small accounts; optimize platform choice

psychology_rules.description: Psychology is THE most important factor - discipline is everything

account_scaling.description: Scale position size gradually as account grows; prove strategy at each tier

migration_dump_rules.description: 90% of tokens dump 30-50% post-migration; exploit the rebound

insider_tracking.description: Follow smart money (insiders) but with aggressive stops to prevent rug
